pages.raw_text:
The cooks and walters union has
fair list and the trades council at its
next meeting will be asked to ratify
the action Of that union. When seen
regarding the action this afternoon
Captain McClelland, manager Of the
institution, said:


II am really surprised that the
union should take any such action. IT
seems to have an idea that get
everything for nothing here. but this
win show you for yourself" He
handed tho reporter 4 stack Of bills
Ind allowed hi INTO glance over the
check book.


For the Hungry Mem.
4 "Since this place opened I have
paid out hundreds Of dollars and none
Of the stores give me any more Of a
reduction than they do other people.
/ do not care to cater to the unions.
This is . charitable institution and
we only run for the benefit Of unfor-
tunate people who for the time be-
ing do not have the price to pay for
meals at a first class restaurant.


without Salary.


Z, "Dr. Bull. the owner. does not ex-
pect a cent on his investment and
myself have not drawn a cent in sal
airy since we opened up. The fact is.
I would have been compelled to close
business two months ago If it had not
been for the assistance of some Of my
friends. In that bundle Of bills there
is a great sum represented and last
week alone I paid out over 800 for
bread and q like sum for meat"
